name: an overrides[].files glob that matches the file disables the rule for that file, so the otherwise-blocking violation is suppressed
command:
printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && printf 'name: t
extends: []
rules:
  g-k8s-no-privileged-container: error
overrides:
  - files: ["**/pod.yaml"]
    rules:
      g-k8s-no-privileged-container: off
' > prof.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile prof.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'disabled=1' e.txt && echo override-glob-match-disables 1>&2
